base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of samus_walk — a character (playable) from 1986 metroid. legs alternating. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 3-frame walk cycle — legs alternating; head/torso stable; arm-cannon horizontal
